message:
fix: harden expression index planner filter and add mutation test

- Restore conservative columns.len() == key_term_count() check for
  plain column indexes in the planner filter (guards against corrupted
  index metadata from legacy databases)
- Add comprehensive mutation conformance test (s487b) that verifies
  INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE all correctly maintain expression indexes
  after creation, matching rusqlite oracle

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
